title: A young woman holding a lamp
description_short: A young woman holds a lamp while reaching for a book on a shelf in a dim interior, where artificial light structures the scene.
keywords: Mezzotints, People with candles in art

title: Old woman examining a coin by a lantern
description_short: An elderly woman examines a coin by lantern light, her face and hands emerging from darkness in a strongly contrasted chiaroscuro composition.
keywords: Lanterns in art, 17th-century paintings of women

title: Boy Reading at Artificial Light
description_short: A young boy reads by artificial light in an interior, the illuminated page and face contrasting with the surrounding darkness.
keywords: Paintings of boys with books, People with candles in art

title: The Elegant Reader
description_short: A seated man reads in a quiet interior illuminated by an Argand lamp, with light carefully structuring the composition and emphasizing attentive concentration.
keywords: Men reading in art, Argand lamps, 1810s interiors in art
